reviews.feedback: looks great, but I would like all code change instructions to include the verbiage 'delegate to Agent Team to implement the following with red/green TDD, and document change with demo using 'uvx showboat --help'.    This can be a single line directly under the '## Refined Instructions'  that applies to all code changes.   Also, for every instruction step, add a 'Spawn a <agent-identifier> teammate to'.  For example, the first step becomes 1. **Spawn a Retry-Agent teammate to Add retry-with-backoff to `_run_child()` in `rlm_adk/dispatch.py` (line 383).**
the output with the skill use is much better

looks great, but it we should include provider-fake fixture construction and subsequent provider-fake e2e testing an in-line TDD activity with follow-up demo and showboat review for all new features and skills. I would to name the essential requirements that the fixture design should capture, focusing on capturing intent, not just an error-free e2e test that can be reward hacked.
the result using the skill is SO much better
